response_quality.message_zh: 答案呈现明显交替规律，可能存在乱答或机器作答。
response_quality.message_en: Your answers show a clear alternating pattern, which may indicate random or automated responding.

response_quality.message_zh: 答案明显偏向 A 侧或 B 侧，可能存在理解偏差或敷衍。
response_quality.message_en: Responses are strongly biased toward one side; possible misunderstanding or rushing.

data_quality_notes: 你的 Holland 得分区分度较低（各类型分数接近），三码可能不能清晰代表你的兴趣偏好，建议结合日常经历进一步验证。/ Your Holland scores show low differentiation (types are close together), so the three-letter code may not clearly represent your interests. Validate against your daily experiences.
答案呈现明显交替规律，可能存在乱答或机器作答。 / Your answers show a clear alternating pattern, which may indicate random or automated responding.
答案明显偏向 A 侧或 B 侧，可能存在理解偏差或敷衍。 / Responses are strongly biased toward one side; possible misunderstanding or rushing.

Gallup 模拟量表 A/B 双侧映射已完整（双侧计分题 98.3%，34/34 个主题参与计分）。结果为探索性参考，非官方 CliftonStrengths 报告。/ Gallup simulation has full A/B mapping (dual-side 98.3%, 34/34 themes scored). Results are for exploration—not an official CliftonStrengths report.
